## Description
Clearly describe what this PR fixes or adds.

## Type of change
- [ ] Bug fix (fixes a malformed formatting edge case)
- [ ] New feature (adds a new structural translation wrapper)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Chore / Maintenance

## Checklist:
- [ ] I have run `bun run fmt` and `bun run lint` locally.
- [ ] I have added tests in `tests/parser.test.ts` that prove my fix works.
- [ ] All tests pass successfully via `bun run test`.
- [ ] I have updated the `README.md` if necessary.
